untranslatable_reason: Signal requires SADF (Supremum Augmented Dickey-Fuller) and C_ADF (critical ADF values) indicators which are not available in the allowed indicator set. These are specialized econometric tail-behavior diagnostics not derivable from standard price/volume/oscillator indicators (open, high, low, close, volume, sma_*, ema_*, rsi_*, atr_*, bb_*, macd, adx, stoch, donchian, pivots, vol_ratio_20, hvol_20, india_vix, price_pos_20, returns, log_returns, body properties). The normalized ratio (SADF − C_ADF)/C_ADF and the confirmation threshold values are also not specified in the source signal.
translation_notes: This signal is based on advanced time-series econometrics (explosive root detection via supremum ADF testing) that cannot be approximated using standard technical indicators. To implement this signal, SADF and C_ADF would need to be added as custom indicators to the backtesting engine. The signal is directionally agnostic (context-dependent) and targets trending and high-volatility regimes, but without the underlying tail-divergence calculation, translation is not feasible.
